title: Cnv_Accel Statement
parameters:
conveyorNumber	Integer expression representing the conveyor number (1 ~ 16).

accel/decel	Acceleration and deceleration of tracking motion
description:
Sets acceleration and deceleration of the tracking motion in Conveyor Tracking.

Acceleration and deceleration cannot be set separately.

Change the parameters when acceleration setting error occurs, or when it is required to reduce work picking time.  The default value is 2000[mm/sec2].

Note

This command will only work if the Conveyor Tracking option is active.
see_also:
Cnv_Accel Function

Cnv_Accel Statement Example

Cnv_Accel 1, 2000
